creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
mew-xemacs21-mule port has been ported as editors/xemacs-mule ->
editors/xemacs21-mule. This port is a xemacs21-mule part of mail/mew* ports
family. Before this port commit,please repositry copy:
mail/mew-xemacs-mule -> mail/mew-xemacs21-mule
and then delete mail/mew-xemacs-mule.

I put the port with shar `find mew-xemacs21-mule` below "Fix:"
